entities.description: som tl3588 is a core board mentioned as the basis for the design of a base board  indicating it is a hardware product used in the design process
base board is the product being designed based on the som tl3588 core board  indicating it is a hardware product
minimum system design requirements are the specific criteria that must be met during the design process of the base board

relations.description: the som tl3588 core board is the foundation for the design of the base board
the som tl3588 core board must meet the minimum system design requirements during the base board design process
the base board must satisfy the minimum system design requirements as part of its design process
